title: A song to represent 30
wikitext:
[]: A song to represent 3.0             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Thu Jul 10, 2014 4:48 pm I would chose Beneath the Remains from Sepultura, because the lyrics remind me of the situation on 3.0 and also reminds me the Shinji's feeling and vision of things in this movie. [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tEy6AmHO768[/url] And it also represents some of the viewers feelings about the present and future of the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Jul 10, 2014 5:18 pm But nothing can replace Sakura Nagashi as the summary of the mood of Q !

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Jul 10, 2014 5:21 pm Or if you want a summary of Shinji's mood at the end of Q, there is "Famously..."

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Jul 10, 2014 7:02 pm Komm Susser Tod Piano forte http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CuRwRlicEmw But anyways, I'm fairly sure that Komm Susser Tod or a similar replacement will show up in Final.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Thu Jul 10, 2014 7:07 pm Guys... It would be nice if you use songs that you like to listen. Try to not use songs from Evangelion, use songs you think it would fit in Shinji's feeling of the situation and the situation of 3.0 itself.

[]:             Quote Post by Koishiro » Mon Jul 14, 2014 6:18 pm Röyksopp - You Don't Have a Clue http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5TPxCl1avSw I love it. And the lyrics fits strangely well when looking at Shinji/Kaworu relation.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Jul 26, 2014 2:40 am I'm thinking Peter Gabriel's I Don't Remember .

[]:             Quote Post by Amitch1991 » Sat Jul 26, 2014 9:16 am it's got to be Sakura Nagashi hasn't it ? at least i think of 3.0 when i hear it

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Jul 26, 2014 9:03 pm Evanescence's Never go back . Influenced/inspired by the same natural disaster, to boot...

[]:             Quote Post by Koritsuyuutsu » Mon Jul 28, 2014 10:11 am We Suck Young Blood by Radiohead I think, being that the lyrics are: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by doonchlando » Sun Aug 03, 2014 10:17 pm "Down in a Hole" by Alice In Chains gives me a similar feeling to the end of 3.0. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6KLjWpdzWaQ
summary:
[]: A song to represent 3.0             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Thu Jul 10, 2014 4:48 pm I would chose Beneath the Remains from Sepultura, because the lyrics remind me of the situation on 3.0 and also reminds me the Shinji's feeling and vision of things in this movie. [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tEy6AmHO768[/url] And it also represents some of the viewers feelings about the present and future of the movie.
